name: body-kindness-transform-your-health-from-the-inside-out-and-never-diet-again
description: Rebecca Scritchfield's science-based, compassionate approach to health — replacing dieting, food rules, and body criticism with intuitive eating, joyful movement, and self-love.
useCase: Develop a healthier relationship with food, exercise, sleep, emotions, and your body through the Body Kindness philosophy of love, connection, and care.
knownRisks: May challenge deeply held beliefs about dieting and weight
Not suitable for those seeking rapid weight loss
May trigger discomfort around food and body issues
